# llms.txt for the Burgess Principle

Core idea: Every person deserves to be seen as an individual, not a data point.

Single guiding question: "Was a human member of the team able to personally review the specific facts of my individual situation?"

Tone: Warm, respectful, calm, and empowering. Never confrontational.

Key elements: 
- Free for personal use by individuals
- Combines the question with rights (Equality Act reasonable adjustments, DSAR, Article 22, FOI)
- Designed to be dropped into any AI for instant personalised help

Summary: A simple framework to politely ask institutions for human attention on your specific case.

https://github.com/ljbudgie/burgess-principle

Creator: The Burgess Principle (UK00004343685) — the original source.
